label: UTA News - 10th Annual AI & Analytics Symposium
description: Quoted in the official UTA College of Business news release covering the 10th Annual AI & Analytics Symposium, where ReRhythm placed as Second Runner Up.
publication: University of Texas at Arlington - College of Business
quote: Through this competition, I was able to apply cutting-edge skills like AI, cloud computing, and Retrieval-Augmented Generation (RAG) to solve an actual business problem, which is exactly the kind of hands-on learning experience that sets UTA apart.

label: Second Runner Up - AWS Hackathon / UTA Symposium 2026
description: Recognized at the AWS Hackathon / UTA Symposium for ReRhythm, a generative AI platform built with AWS Bedrock, Claude, ChromaDB, RAG, CloudFormation, and ECS.
author: Samuel Mamootil
authorTitle: DevOps Engineer · MS Information Systems Graduate, UTA
postText: Thrilled to share that ReRhythm placed Second Runner Up at the AWS Hackathon / UTA Symposium 2026. ReRhythm is a generative AI platform built with AWS Bedrock, Claude, ChromaDB, RAG, CloudFormation, and ECS to analyze document data, identify skill gaps, and generate intelligent workflow recommendations.

description: Featured in UTA Business Instagram post showcasing ReRhythm demo day.
